scripts.dev:setup: docker compose up -d db && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm seed

pnpm.//: argon2 and esbuild ship native/postinstall build scripts that pnpm 10 gates behind approval. Listing them here lets `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` (Docker build stage, CI) build them non-interactively — without it argon2's binary is never built and `require('argon2')` fails at runtime. Re-verify argon2's musl-alpine prebuild coverage on any argon2 major bump (the node:22-alpine image has no C++ toolchain to compile from source).
